subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hello Bob,

Thank you for following up. I’d be happy to help get a meeting on the calendar to discuss potential collaboration.

We can offer the following meeting windows:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

If any of those options works for you, please send your preferred date and time and we can coordinate next steps.

Regarding direct internal contact details, I’m not able to share internal email addresses or phone numbers. For general contact and company information, please use the public website.

Best regards,
